mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tiktok_adgroups ( advertiser_id, campaign_id, adgroup_id, adgroup_name, placement_type, placements, budget, budget_mode, billing_event, bid_type, bid_price, location_ids, age_groups, gender, languages, interest_category_ids, schedule_type, schedule_start_time, schedule_end_time, operation_status ) VALUES ( #{advertiserId}, #{campaignId}, #{adgroupId}, #{adgroupName}, #{placementType}, #{placements}, #{budget}, #{budgetMode}, #{billingEvent}, #{bidType}, #{bidPrice}, #{locationIds}, #{ageGroups}, #{gender}, #{languages}, #{interestCategoryIds}, #{scheduleType}, #{scheduleStartTime}, #{scheduleEndTime}, #{operationStatus} )
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tiktok_adgroups WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_adgroups WHERE adgroup_id = #{adgroupId} LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM tiktok_adgroups WHERE campaign_id = #{campaignId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_adgroups WHERE advertiser_id = #{advertiserId} ORDER BY id DESC
SELECT * FROM tiktok_adgroups ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE tiktok_adgroups SET adgroup_name = #{adgroupName}, placement_type = #{placementType}, placements = #{placements}, budget = #{budget}, budget_mode = #{budgetMode}, billing_event = #{billingEvent}, bid_type = #{bidType}, bid_price = #{bidPrice}, location_ids = #{locationIds}, age_groups = #{ageGroups}, gender = #{gender}, languages = #{languages}, interest_category_ids = #{interestCategoryIds}, schedule_type = #{scheduleType}, schedule_start_time = #{scheduleStartTime}, schedule_end_time = #{scheduleEndTime}, operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tiktok_adgroups SET operation_status = #{operationStatus}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE adgroup_id = #{adgroupId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO tiktok_adgroups ( advertiser_id, campaign_id, adgroup_id, adgroup_name, placement_type, placements, budget, budget_mode, billing_event, bid_type, bid_price, location_ids, age_groups, gender, languages, interest_category_ids, schedule_type, schedule_start_time, schedule_end_time, operation_status ) VALUES
(#{item.advertiserId}, #{item.campaignId}, #{item.adgroupId}, #{item.adgroupName}, #{item.placementType}, #{item.placements}, #{item.budget}, #{item.budgetMode}, #{item.billingEvent}, #{item.bidType}, #{item.bidPrice}, #{item.locationIds}, #{item.ageGroups}, #{item.gender}, #{item.languages}, #{item.interestCategoryIds}, #{item.scheduleType}, #{item.scheduleStartTime}, #{item.scheduleEndTime}, #{item.operationStatus})
ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE adgroup_name = VALUES(adgroup_name), placement_type = VALUES(placement_type), placements = VALUES(placements), budget = VALUES(budget), budget_mode = VALUES(budget_mode), billing_event = VALUES(billing_event), bid_type = VALUES(bid_type), bid_price = VALUES(bid_price), location_ids = VALUES(location_ids), age_groups = VALUES(age_groups), gender = VALUES(gender), languages = VALUES(languages), interest_category_ids = VALUES(interest_category_ids), schedule_type = VALUES(schedule_type), schedule_start_time = VALUES(schedule_start_time), schedule_end_time = VALUES(schedule_end_time), operation_status = VALUES(operation_status), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
